name: wanxiangshu
description: wanxiangshu: multi-agent plugin runtime in F#→JS via Fable

scripts.build-and-test: dotnet fable wanxiangshu.fsproj --outDir build && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e/omp-driver && cp e2e/*.js e2e/*.ts build/e2e/ && cp e2e/omp-driver/*.ts build/e2e/omp-driver/ && sed -i 's|../../e2e/harness.js|./harness.js|g' build/e2e/Tests.js && sed -i 's|../../e2e/mux-harness.js|./mux-harness.js|g' build/e2e/MuxTests.js 2>/dev/null || true && node tests/runner.js
scripts.e2e: dotnet fable wanxiangshu.fsproj --outDir build --noCache && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e/omp-driver && cp e2e/*.js e2e/*.ts build/e2e/ && cp e2e/omp-driver/*.ts build/e2e/omp-driver/ && sed -i 's|../../e2e/harness.js|./harness.js|g' build/e2e/Tests.js && node tests/runner.js --e2e
scripts.e2e:mux: dotnet fable wanxiangshu.fsproj --outDir build --noCache && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e/omp-driver && cp e2e/*.js e2e/*.ts build/e2e/ && cp e2e/omp-driver/*.ts build/e2e/omp-driver/ && sed -i 's|../../e2e/harness.js|./harness.js|g' build/e2e/Tests.js && sed -i 's|../../e2e/mux-harness.js|./mux-harness.js|g' build/e2e/MuxTests.js && node tests/runner.js --e2e-mux
scripts.e2e-omp: dotnet fable wanxiangshu.fsproj --outDir build --noCache && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e/omp-driver && cp e2e/*.js e2e/*.ts build/e2e/ && cp e2e/omp-driver/*.ts build/e2e/omp-driver/ && node tests/runner.js --e2e-omp
